name: Greek-style Baked Pasta
method: Gently sauté the onion in olive oil, for 2-3 minutes over medium heat. Add in the ground lamb and garlic and cook
for 10 minutes, or until the meat cooks well. Stir in the marinara sauce. Season with pepper and salt, to taste.
In a blender, blend 2 cups of the ricotta with the eggs, nutmeg and 1/2 cup of the Parmesan cheese until smooth.
Meanwhile, cook the pasta according package instructions. Drain and set aside in an oiled baking dish.
Add the lamb mixture to the pasta and toss to combine. Pour the ricotta mixture on top and sprinkle with the
Bake the pasta until the cheese turns golden, 15-20 minutes.
One of the easiest, most delicious meals to make in the summer is pasta with pesto. It’s super quick to prepare. All
you need is some fresh basil, a couple cloves of garlic, pine nuts or walnuts (both work well), olive oil, Parmesan
cheese, and salt and pepper if desired. It's tasty, nutritious, and easy on the budget. You'll love how this pasta dish
takes advantage of fresh vegetables and herbs grown at home too!
